name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: We fell short this weekend, Peter
body:
Help us hit today's goal. | Peter --

We've mapped out every day left in this election -- and we know exactly what we need to raise every 24 hours to fund our organization and beat Trump.

This weekend, for the first time since the convention, we fell short.

And I wouldn't feel bad about that except I'm pretty sure that Trump's fundraising is still picking up steam after his $80 million month in July.

The amount we raise determines how many field organizers we can hire in states like Ohio or how many people in Nevada will see a Hillary for America ad that week.

If this becomes a pattern, we could fall behind Trump’s team for the month of August. Trump and the GOP already came really close to beating us in July -- we can’t let them close the gap and overtake us.

**Will you chip in right now to get a free sticker and make sure we hit today’s goal?** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjYxODU5OTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYxNDcwMDg5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks so much,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 and be one of the more than 2 million people standing with her:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjYxODU5OTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYxNDcwMDg5S0&mt=1&rt=0)

| Greetings,
---
| I am writing to ask you to join our campaign for change and vote for me in the Republican primary today. I will be heading to the polls soon to cast my own ballot. Throughout this primary, I have remained focused on solutions to the issues facing Vermonters, and refused to let negative rhetoric get in the way of sharing my priorities, despite an onslaught of deceptive messaging from my opponent.

Those tactics have increasingly defined national elections and have degraded Americans’ faith in government and the political system. I hope that with a positive approach and clear priorities, I have earned your trust, your respect, and most importantly, earned your vote today.

**After facing nearly $2 million in dishonest attack ads, I will need every vote. Please share this letter with your friends and on social media. We need to get out the vote.**

This race has been the most contentious of any that I can remember but with your support today we can make a statement that Vermonters are going to elect a leader with a positive vision for making the economy and affordability the top priorities in Montpelier. I am more committed than ever to fighting for affordability and leading and serving this state.

Again, I ask for your vote today and thank you in advance for your support. I won’t let you down.

Sincerely,

Phil Scott

P.S. I want to invite you to join my campaign team and me tonight for our primary election celebration at the Barre Granite Museum. We will be there to watch the results from 7:00 – 10:00 p.m.

Friends, How can we tell you about our dad and what he means to us? How can we adequately explain how good of a father he is -- and also how great of a governor we know he'll be? We can honestly say that the guy you may have seen on TV is authentic. He is 100% the real deal. **[Today, our dad's campaign is releasing an ad that tries to capture that from three people who know him best -- us, his daughters.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202730/2fde7c66/405065f3/156a4b3f/1549066385/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-ourdadpreview?utm_campaign=fnd_dadad1_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_160809_fnd_gq_dadad1_nonpre__hnc&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")** **We hope you enjoy it, and we hope you pitch in so that we can show it off to others:** [](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202730/2fde7c66/405065f3/156a4b3f/1549066385/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-ourdadpreview?utm_campaign=fnd_dadad1_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_160809_fnd_gq_dadad1_nonpre__hnc&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Our dad never came home from work without a smile on his face or without giving us a hug. Whether it's public education or the environment, he wants the best for his children, future grandchildren, and all of the children in this great state. I hope you will join me in standing up for Marco.

Thanks,
Trey Gowdy

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Can we count on you?
body:
Trump is wrong | Peter, Donald Trump recently received a disturbing vote of confidence -- from the chairman of the American Nazi Party.

His name is Rocky Suhayda, and he went on his radio show to talk about the “real opportunity” that he thinks a Trump presidency would present. Suhayda believes that President Donald Trump could show our country and the world that the white supremacist ideology is “not so unpopular.”

Suhayda is far from the first white nationalist to support Trump -- David Duke, the former grand wizard of the KKK, regularly praises Trump, the Trump campaign selected a prominent white nationalist as one of its California delegates, and a tweet from a white nationalist account was even projected on giant screens at the Republican National Convention.

The chair of the American Nazi Party enthusiastically supporting the Republican nominee for president is not normal, and we shouldn’t accept it as such. We can’t get numb to his radicalism or that of his supporters. **[We have to stand up to Trump’s bigoted, hateful campaign.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjYxODkzODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYxNTM1MDU0S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

The scariest part of all is that Trump’s own statements and policy proposals -- like building a wall on the Mexican border, banning Muslim immigration, and encouraging confrontations with protesters at his rallies -- echo the thinking of these white supremacist groups. White supremacists see themselves in Trump -- and they’re excited about what a Trump presidency would mean for them.

The only thing standing between Trump and the White House is all of us. Peter, as one of Hillary’s core supporters, you are one of the most essential people working to help Hillary win this race and keep Trump -- and all his ideas -- as far from the Oval Office as possible. **They raised $82 million in July, so now it’s time for our team to fight back even harder. Can we count on you to chip in right now? When you make your first donation, we’ll say thanks with a free sticker:**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjYxODkzODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYxNTM1MDU0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Christina

Christina Reynolds
Deputy Communications Director
Hillary for America

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 and be one of the more than 2 million people standing with her:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjYxODkzODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYxNTM1MDU0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

It’s Primary Election Day, and with the tremendous support we’ve seen throughout this campaign – from those who have attended events, walked parade routes, put out lawn signs and carried the Phil Scott banner throughout this tough Primary – we feel confident your support will help elect Phil Scott as Governor.

But, first **we have to cross that finish line, and _we only do that with your vote today_**! [According to WCAX](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=b961032237&e=19cebfe173), **political analysts expect a _very close election today_** , with one expert saying the Republican Primary will be **“a closer race than most people predict.”**

That means that **_EVERY VOTE WILL COUNT_**! We know we have the grassroots support from Vermonters who want positive campaigns and a Phil Scott Administration that will help **grow our economy and make Vermont more affordable.**

But we also know **our opponent has spent $2 million from his own pocket to deceive voters with fraudulent negative ads and baseless accusations and attacks**. WCAX analysts also assert “the $2 million[our opponent] spent on negative ads against Lieutenant Governor Phil Scott has been money well spent.”

**We must make sure that prediction does not become a reality** at the end of the day. We need your help to overcome our opponent’s lies, and send a clear message for the general election – **we will not stand for DC-style politics, and _elections cannot be bought_ in Vermont. **

**_Get to the polls today to vote for Phil Scott_** as the Republican candidate for Governor and ask your friends and family to do the same.

Thanks for your support!
---
| **Listen, Learn, Lead: Phil Scott**
Phil Scott is a consistent voice of reason and common sense in Montpelier. As the only Republican elected to statewide office, Phil shows determination and leadership in advocating for Vermonters and promoting policies and programs that benefit Vermont families and the economy. That’s why he has the support of more than 100 current and former Republican leaders, including Governor Jim Douglas and former State Auditor Randy Brock. Read about Phil Scott’s plans at [www.philscott.org](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=10e8fc9f8f&e=19cebfe173).

**" But more importantly, unleashing the lawyers every time he sees an ad he doesn't like gives voters the impression Gianforte is a thin-skinned politician."** \--_Bozeman Chronicle,_ 8/4/16 Friend,

Greg Gianforte is finding that it's not that easy to just buy an election. Recently, he tried to get a TV ad pulled -- paying a high-priced, out-of-state law firm (infamous for their role in Citizens United) to threaten to sue Montana TV stations if they didn't stop running a spot letting voters know that after moving here from New Jersey, Mr. Gianforte filed a lawsuit to terminate stream access on his property.

We get why Greg Gianforte doesn't want Montanans to know this. But here, we don't expect to be able to strong-arm our way out of past positions or threaten lawsuits every time we don't like something. **[Make sure his tactics don't work and pitch in $15.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=PnZhfcNbtUHMtyBa6zD7ScIkHqGuHg%2Fr)**

Unfortunately for Mr. Gianforte, all the money in the world can't change the facts. Despite trying to throw his weight around, the station continued running the ad -- responding to his bullying ploy by explaining that he did file a lawsuit and he did move to Montana (as a millionaire, by the way) from New Jersey.

**But Greg Gianforte has already put more than a million dollars of his own money into this race and we fully expect him to continue to use his fortune to try to hide the truth.[Call him out and donate $15.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=kmq4LQxPmNmavpXgki9nj8IkHqGuHg%2Fr) **

Thanks,

Bullock HQ

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Defeating Debbie Wasserman Schultz
body:
#
Many of you already know that I've endorsed a candidate, Tim Canova, who is challenging the former head of the Democratic Party Debbie Wasserman Schultz in Florida.
This race is very important for Our Revolution because if we can win this tough fight in Florida, it will send a clear message about the power of our grassroots movement that will send shockwaves through the political and media establishments. The latest poll shows us within reach.
**July 31 Poll**
**Debbie Wasserman Schultz:** 46%
**Tim Canova:** 38%
**Undecided:** 16%
This is going to be close. [Please chip in $3 to Tim Canova's campaign so that we can get as many voters to the polls as possible before the August 30th primary.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/canova-dws?refcode=em160809 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/canova-dws?refcode=em160809")
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/canova-dws?refcode=em160809 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/canova-dws?refcode=em160809")**
Much like in our campaign for president, Tim started off as a major underdog in this race, battling a well-known and well-established person who was the chairwoman of the Democratic Party.
He is running a tough campaign on the kind of progressive platform we need to see in this country: opposing the Trans-Pacific Partnership, backing free tuition at public colleges and universities, reforming a corrupt campaign finance system and raising the minimum wage to $15 an hour. Tim is on the side of working people and that's why we need to help him win.
[Please make an urgent $3 contribution to Tim Canova's campaign today so his campaign can put it to use before the primary against Debbie Wasserman Schultz on August 30th.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/canova-dws?refcode=em160809 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/canova-dws?refcode=em160809")
The recent emails leaked from Democratic Party staff showed that under Debbie Wasserman Schultz, DNC staff were not exactly fair and even-minded during the presidential primary. What was revealed wasn't much of a shock to us, because we knew all along that the establishment wasn't on our side.
But now that Debbie Wasserman Schultz has resigned we have the opportunity to transform the Democratic Party and open up its doors to working people and young people -- people who want real change. Democrats must make it crystal clear that their party is prepared to take on Wall Street and the powerful corporate interests whose greed is doing so much harm to our country. We must stand with Americans who are working longer hours for lower wages, the uninsured, students leaving school deeply in debt and all those worried about climate change.
I believe Tim Canova is the kind of candidate whose policies will move the Democratic Party and our country in that direction. Electing Tim will send a strong message to the Democratic establishment about what this party should stand for. That's why I'm asking you today to help send him to Congress:
[Can you rush a $3 contribution to Tim Canova's campaign today before this critical primary against Debbie Wasserman Schultz on August 30th?](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/canova-dws?refcode=em160809 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/canova-dws?refcode=em160809")
This race has been an uphill battle from the very beginning, but the latest poll has us very close. I am confident we can win this fight with your support.
Thank you for being a part of Our Revolution.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/canova-dws?refcode=em160809 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/canova-dws?refcode=em160809")**

Paid for by Our Revolution
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002 | (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests and help build the future of our political revolution by [adding a contribution here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email_footer").

| Friend,

My husband is proud of his ability to bridge gaps and bring people together. It’s one of the qualities I admire about him.

With our country and our state so severely divided, now more than ever, we need a consensus builder with a strong track record of getting commonsense, conservative results that move Indiana forward.

**Eric is that leader. He can bring every Hoosier together, and that’s why we need him to become our next Governor of Indiana.**

**On Wednesday, we’ll be 90 days away from Election Day**. Help me kick off my husband’s campaign by raising $10,000 before this important deadline. [**Contribute today to become a Founding Member of our campaign.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/c2de9c7a16ee411880ee1416dc07f089?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=d89f702d88d64688b57a1efc80412524&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=text_body_cta_1&utm_term=Fundraising_Deadline&utm_campaign=GFR&utm_content=20160809-bringing-us-together-16266-direct)

As his partner in life, I’ve always seen Eric answer the call to serve. He’s a veteran of the U.S. Navy. He was a trusted advisor to Governor Daniels and Senator Coats. And as the former state chairman of the Indiana Republican Party, he’s always put the lives and livelihoods of Hoosiers first.

Eric has a unique ability to bring everyone to the table and get things done. _Now, he needs your support._

**Our $10,000 fundraising goal is to make sure we can build the momentum necessary to win in November – and we only have until Wednesday to raise it!**

We need your help to kick off this campaign on solid ground and make sure that Eric has the support necessary to win in November. We need leaders like you to step up and help us today.

subject: They're terrified
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, PO Box 133 W
body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50432/7be36b49/1ed91808/78f8d28d/867297981/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")
---
Friend -- On Friday, Evan emailed to warn you that the first ads attacking him, sponsored by the Koch brothers, were going up on the air.

But it's not just the Kochs. Now national Republicans are attacking Evan, too. **They know -- like we do -- that this race is a pure "toss-up."** So they're going to release negative ad after negative ad, hoping to squash some of Evan's popularity.

**Meanwhile, we 'll be building the most extensive grassroots Senate campaign Indiana has ever seen. [Will you help us do it?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50432/7be36b49/1ed91808/78f8d28c/867297981/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-ballotbox?refcode=20160809nabxg&amount=25")** | [](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50432/7be36b49/1ed91808/78f8d28c/867297981/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-ballotbox?refcode=20160809nabxg&amount=25")
---
There's a reason we're seeing all of these attacks, all at once. **Our opponents are terrified that Evan can beat them and end their special interest giveaways in Washington.**

They're fighting hard to trash Evan's reputation, even claiming that Evan supports higher taxes (something he's fought against his entire career!). This means we have to fight _doubly hard_ to get his message out there and build our person-to-person, voter-to-voter grassroots network. **So we can beat them where it counts -- at the ballot box.**
[**Friend, pitch in now to support our campaign -- for a greater Indiana, and a Washington that works for YOU.**](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50432/7be36b49/1ed91808/78f8d28c/867297981/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-ballotbox?refcode=20160809nabxg&amount=25")

Thanks,

Team Bayh

subject: a huge threat:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:

---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2cb4/738133e4/373dde01/7f82efeb/3989245214/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160809bf?refcode=pme160809bf_m&recurring=true&amount=25")
---
| Something big is happening in Florida, everyone. My friend Patrick Murphy's race is one of our best chances to take back the Senate from Mitch McConnell. And once Marco Rubio broke his promise to run again for a job he hates, things could not be closer.

But not surprisingly, Patrick's opponents are trying hard to stop him -- from devious push polls, to misleading ads, to flooding Florida with dark money. We knew this wouldn't be easy. **They know he can defeat Marco Rubio, and that makes him a huge threat to their control of the Senate.**

Patrick's beaten big GOP spending before. His very first election against Tea Party extremist Allen West was the most expensive Congressional race ever at the time. He can do it again, but he needs your help to meet the campaign's $50,000 goal before the final primary FEC deadline. [**Please chip in before tomorrow at midnight >>**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2cb4/738133e4/373dde01/7f82efeb/3989245214/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160809bf?refcode=pme160809bf_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

**Unlike Marco Rubio, Patrick will show up and work hard for the people of Florida.** He's been a strong fighter for middle class and working families -- and our shared democratic values. From financial reform that works, to LGBT rights, to protecting Florida's environment and coastlines, Patrick's right on the issues that matter. If we elect him, he will bring the fight to the U.S. Senate and help improve the lives of all Americans. I am sure of it.

Turning Florida blue could not be more crucial to America's future. We can't let this chance slip through our fingers or we risk losing control of the Senate for another cycle. Plus, the reality is, campaigns are judged in part on their fundraising numbers. So meeting this goal before the primary FEC deadline tomorrow at midnight is of the utmost importance.

[**Can you donate $7 now to win in Florida and retake the Senate?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2cb4/738133e4/373dde01/7f82efeb/3989245214/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160809bf?refcode=pme160809bf_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

Thanks,
Barney Frank

|

name: Pat Murray (via VanHollen.org)
subject: Congress needs to do this now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
|
>
>
>
Friend,

The Zika virus is spreading and nationwide medical experts are frantically calling for Congress to approve additional funding to combat the virus.

Their pleas are falling on deaf ears as the threat continues to rise across our country.

Speaker Paul Ryan and Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell gave Congress a seven-week vacation without passing a bill to provide the $1.1 billion needed to fight the virus. This is absolutely unacceptable.

[**That 's why today we're calling on you to add your name to join Chris in demanding Congress return from its extended recess to pass life-saving legislation funding nationwide efforts to eradicate the Zika virus.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a5a/70cdc2ba/470e4f99/3976863/3252059611/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/demand-action-on-zika-?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Thatrsquos+why+today+wersquore+calling+o&utm_campaign=em080916&source=em080916")

It's time for the Republican majority in Congress to stop playing partisan games with this funding. Congressional Republicans are dragging their heels.

Their actions are unconscionable. Medical experts at the Center for Disease Control warn that new tools and methods to reduce the mosquito population in at-risk communities cannot be put in place without the additional funding stalled in Washington.

The lives of pregnant women and their unborn children are at risk. We can't allow this impasse to continue. Paul Ryan and Mitch McConnell need to bring Congress back now so, in a bipartisan vote focused on what is best for the American people, the funding can move forward.

[**Add your name here to support immediate bipartisan Congressional action to pass the Zika funding bill.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a5a/70cdc2ba/470e4f99/3976860/3252059611/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/demand-action-on-zika-?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+here+to+support+immediate+&utm_campaign=em080916&source=em080916")

Thank you for your support.

Pat Murray
Campaign Manager
>

---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: re: Trump’s comments
body:
We cannot stay silent | Peter --

Donald Trump said this at a rally in North Carolina today:

_"If she gets to pick her judges, [there's] nothing you can do folks. Although, the Second Amendment people, maybe there is. I don’t know."_

This is not normal or acceptable talk from a presidential candidate.

But when decent people stay silent at moments like this, we let it become normal.

We all need to stand up right now and show that we don't tolerate this kind of politics in America -- before future candidates get the impression that they would benefit from running this kind of campaign.

Thanks,

Christina
